gist.headline: Tidying the Tinybird nest
gist.blurb: We're doing some spring cleaning in our observability stack, consolidating our Tinybird public tokens to keep the backend neat and tidy.
gist.summary: Consolidated Tinybird public tokens for model stats and health monitoring into a single access token.
gist.impact: Simplifies our internal observability infrastructure and prepares for the safe removal of legacy workspace tokens.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel art bird (representing Tinybird) sitting in a nest made of glowing data streams or tokens. The pollinations bee is helping the bird organize glowing tokens into a single neat pile.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot helping a tiny blue bird organize glowing digital tokens into a neat nest. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
